query: SELECT id, name, topThingsToDo FROM island_guides WHERE topThingsToDo IS NOT NULL LIMIT 3;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT id, name, topThingsToDo FROM island_guides WHERE topThingsToDo IS NOT NULL LIMIT 3;

rows.name: Malé
rows.topThingsToDo: [{"emoji":"🕌","title":"Explore the Grand Friday Mosque (Masjid-al-Sultan Muhammad Thakurufaanu Al Auzam)","description":"Visit the largest mosque in the Maldives, an impressive architectural marvel with a golden dome that is a significant cultural and religious landmark."},{"emoji":"🏪","title":"Wander through the Local Market (Malé Local Market)","description":"Immerse yourself in local life by exploring the bustling market, offering fresh produce, local snacks, and a glimpse into daily Maldivian commerce."},{"emoji":"🐠","title":"Visit the Malé Fish Market","description":"Witness the daily catch brought in by local fishermen and observe the vibrant trade of various fresh seafood, a true insight into the island's primary industry."},{"emoji":"🏛️","title":"Discover the National Museum","description":"Delve into the rich history and cultural heritage of the Maldives through a collection of artifacts, royal antiquities, and historical exhibits."},{"emoji":"🏖️","title":"Stroll along Artificial Beach","description":"Relax at Malé's only man-made beach, popular among locals for swimming, sunbathing, and enjoying the city's waterfront atmosphere."},{"emoji":"🐠","title":"Take a Submarine Tour","description":"Experience the underwater world of the Maldives without getting wet, exploring coral reefs and marine life from the comfort of a tourist submarine."},{"emoji":"👥","title":"Dine at a Local Maldivian Restaurant","description":"Savor authentic Maldivian cuisine, from fresh seafood curries to traditional 'Garudhiya' (fish broth), at one of the many local eateries."},{"emoji":"🚶","title":"Walk through Sultan Park and the Islamic Centre","description":"Enjoy a peaceful stroll through the green oasis of Sultan Park, located adjacent to the impressive Islamic Centre, offering a moment of tranquility amidst the city bustle."}]

rows.name: Maamigili
rows.topThingsToDo: [{"emoji":"🤿","title":"Whale Shark Snorkeling Excursion","description":"Embark on a boat trip to the South Ari Atoll Marine Protected Area (SAMPA), a renowned spot for swimming alongside majestic whale sharks, the gentle giants of the ocean."},{"emoji":"👥","title":"Maamigili Local Island Tour","description":"Wander through the local streets of Maamigili, observe daily life, interact with residents, and experience the authentic culture of a Maldivian fishing community."},{"emoji":"🏄","title":"PADI Certified Diving at Local Reefs","description":"Explore the vibrant underwater world of Alifu Dhaalu Atoll with certified dives to pristine reefs, encountering diverse marine life including colorful corals, reef sharks, and turtles."},{"emoji":"🐠","title":"Sunset Fishing Trip","description":"Join local fishermen on a traditional Dhoni boat as the sun sets, learning Maldivian hand-line fishing techniques and trying your luck at catching dinner."},{"emoji":"🎯","title":"Kayaking or Stand-Up Paddleboarding","description":"Rent a kayak or stand-up paddleboard and explore the calm, turquoise lagoons surrounding Maamigili at your own pace, enjoying the serenity of the ocean."},{"emoji":"🏖️","title":"Beach Relaxation and Stargazing","description":"Spend a peaceful evening on the island's secluded beaches, enjoying the tranquility and gazing at the brilliant, unpolluted night sky filled with stars."},{"emoji":"🎯","title":"Visit Villa International Airport (VAM)","description":"Observe the operations of a local airport, watch seaplanes take off and land, and experience the unique atmosphere of a small island aviation hub."}]

rows.name: Bodufolhudhoo
rows.topThingsToDo: [{"emoji":"🤿","title":"Snorkeling on the House Reef","description":"Explore the vibrant house reef surrounding Bodufolhudhoo, teeming with colorful coral formations and diverse marine life, including reef sharks, turtles, and countless fish species."},{"emoji":"🐬","title":"Dolphin Watching Trip","description":"Embark on a boat trip at sunset to witness pods of playful dolphins leaping and swimming in their natural habitat, a truly magical experience."},{"emoji":"🏖️","title":"Relax on the Bikini Beach","description":"Spend your days unwinding on the island's designated bikini beach, soaking up the sun, swimming in the calm lagoon, and enjoying the serene ocean views."},{"emoji":"🐢","title":"Turtle Snorkeling Excursion","description":"Join a guided excursion to nearby reefs known for their sea turtle populations, offering an incredible opportunity to swim alongside these majestic creatures."},{"emoji":"🎣","title":"Sunset Fishing","description":"Experience traditional Maldivian handline fishing as the sun sets, and perhaps catch your own dinner under the guidance of local fishermen."},{"emoji":"🚶","title":"Explore the Local Village","description":"Wander through the quiet streets of Bodufolhudhoo, interact with friendly locals, observe daily life, and discover small shops and cafes."}]
